description: Use this API to calculate a sparsity preserving ordering of buses in preparation for the processing of network matrices. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = ordr(opt)

parameters.name: opt
parameters.description: Flag for ordering option. (input; 0 by default).

opt.description: assume all branches between in-service buses are in-service.
ignore out-of-service branches in calculating the bus ordering.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
